hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in *.py) /opt/aws_neuronx_venv_pytorch_2_9_nxd_inference/bin/python -m ruff format "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; /opt/aws_neuronx_venv_pytorch_2_9_nxd_inference/bin/python -m ruff check "$f";; esac; } || true
